metadata.title: United States Legal Data — Complete Corpus

horn_rules.structural_chain: Agent(Judge) → Power(Find_Facts AND Apply_Law) → Act(Trial_Without_Jury) → Status(Verdict_Entered)
Agent(Trustee) → Power(Administer_Estate OR Monitor_DIP) → Act(Collect_and_Distribute) → Status(Estate=Settled)
Agent(Defendant) → Act(Enter_AlfordPlea) → Status(Guilt_Accepted BUT Innocence_Maintained) → Status(Conviction_Entered)

constraint_rules.description: 破产自动中止：所有债权人催收权力全局抑制
constraint_rules.effect: Power(Collect)=0 → 所有催收行为中止
constraint_rules.reason: 11 U.S.C. §362 — Automatic Stay

constraint_rules.description: Chapter 11 DIP/Trustee 替代原管理层——董事经营权力被抑制
constraint_rules.reason: 11 U.S.C. §1107-1108 — DIP powers; §1104 — Trustee appointment

constraint_rules.description: Chapter 11 Plan 确认后——状态不可逆（除欺诈撤销外）
constraint_rules.reason: 11 U.S.C. §1141 — Effect of confirmation

constraint_rules.description: 一事不再理——无罪判决后禁止再诉
constraint_rules.reason: U.S. Const. Amend. V — Double Jeopardy Clause

constraint_rules.description: 正当程序——未听证不得剥夺财产/自由
constraint_rules.reason: U.S. Const. Amend. V, XIV — Due Process Clause
US Acquittal edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: FRBP7001_Scope → Only listed proceedings qualify; others → Status=ContestedMatter
constraint_rules.reason: US Adversary proceeding edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: CrossAppeal_Exists → Affirmed_on_one_count does not preclude reversal on another
constraint_rules.reason: US Affirmed edge case trigger
US Automatic stay edge case trigger
US Bankruptcy estate edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Stern_v_Marshall → Non-core matters → Power limited to recommendations
constraint_rules.reason: US Bankruptcy judges edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Judge_Recused → New_Judge must rehear; prior Status=Vacated
constraint_rules.reason: US Bench trial edge case trigger
US Brief edge case trigger
US Capital offense edge case trigger
US Chapter 7 edge case trigger
US Chapter 11 edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Default_in_Plan_Payments → Status converted to Chapter7 OR Dismissal
constraint_rules.reason: US Chapter 13 edge case trigger
US Claim (Bankruptcy) edge case trigger

constraint_rules.reason: US Clerk of court edge case trigger
US Confirmation edge case trigger

constraint_rules.reason: US Counsel edge case trigger
US Counterclaim edge case trigger

constraint_rules.reason: US Debtor in possession (DIP) edge case trigger

constraint_rules.reason: US En banc edge case trigger

constraint_rules.reason: US In forma pauperis edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Secured_Creditor_Relief_from_Stay → Asset removed from Estate before liquidation
constraint_rules.reason: US Liquidation edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Parties_DoNotConsent_to_Magistrate → Power limited to R&R only
constraint_rules.reason: US Magistrate judge edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Debtor_Cures_Default → Motion denied; Stay remains in effect
constraint_rules.reason: US Motion to lift automatic stay edge case trigger
US Nonexempt property edge case trigger

constraint_rules.description: Edge case for Objection to discharge
constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Objection_Overruled → Discharge proceeds; Objection=TimeBarred under FRBP4004
constraint_rules.reason: US Objection to discharge edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Amendment_After_Deadline → Requires leave of court or opposing party consent
constraint_rules.reason: US Pleadings edge case trigger
US Preference edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Late_Filed_Claim → Subordinated or Disallowed; depends on chapter
constraint_rules.reason: US Proof of claim edge case trigger

constraint_rules.source_edge_case: Equitable_Tolling_Applied → Limitations period extended; claim revives
constraint_rules.reason: US Statute of limitations edge case trigger

legal_intent.reason: 普通法承认严格责任——特定行为（如危险品运输）无意图也可构成 Act

capacity_required.reason: 美国法：未成年人可签订必需品合同；公司代理人需授权但表见代理可越权

valid_transitions.reason: 美国法状态机：增加 SUPPRESSED 状态（破产自动中止）、VOIDABLE 双向转换（可追认/可确认无效）

additional_defects.reason: 美国法特有缺陷：宪法保护 + 破产法 + 检察视角

Consideration.reason: 美国普通法继承英国对价原则——无对价无合同（promissory estoppel 为例外）

Automatic_Stay_Suppression.reason: Chapter 11/13 自动中止——债权人 Power(Collect) 被全局抑制

Director_Power.reason: 美国法下：进入 Chapter 11 后，DIP 或 Trustee 接管董事经营权力

compiled_concepts.term: Administrative Office of the United States Courts (AO)
Judicial Conference of the United States

compiled_concepts.prc_mapping: FORCE_VOID → 中国无赏金猎人制度
CN_Campaign_Finance_Law → 功能对等(制度差异大)
CN_Death_Penalty → 功能对等(但复核程序本质不同)
FORCE_VOID → 中国无此制度。以CN_Judge_Excusal替代
CN_Character_Evidence → 功能对等(范围不同)
CN_Intermediate_Court → 功能对等(中国中级法院)
CN_Civil_Law_System → 完全对应(中国属大陆法系)
CN_Constitutional_Rights → 功能对等(体系不同)
CN_Custody_Review → 功能对等(范围不同)
FORCE_VOID → 中国不承认事实婚姻(1994年后)
CN_Cyber_Crime_Law → 功能对等(中国有独立罪名)
CN_Constitutional_Rights → 功能对等(中国宪法不可直接援引)
CN_Prosecutor → 功能对等(体系不同)
CN_Death_Sentence → 功能对等(复核程序不同)
CN_Prosecutorial_Discretion → 功能对等(酌定不起诉)
CN_Preponderance_Standard → 功能对等(高度盖然性)
CN_Privileged_Information → 功能对等(范围不同)
CN_Punitive_Damages_Limited → 范围很窄(知产/消费)
CN_Racial_Discrimination → 功能对等(宪法人人平等)
CN_Reasonable_Doubt → 功能对等(排除合理怀疑)
CN_Restraining_Order → 功能对等(人身安全保护令)
CN_Evidence_Suppression → 功能对等(非法证据排除)
CN_Bankruptcy_Discharge → 功能对等(但商业个人债务范围不同)
CN_Due_Process → 功能对等(中国无第5/14修正案同等级保护)
FORCE_VOID → 中国无普通法/衡平法之分
FORCE_VOID → 中国无衡平法体系
CN_Ex_Parte_Proceeding → 功能对等(范围严格限制)
CN_Exculpatory_Evidence → 功能对等(Brady原则无直接对应)
→ CN_Federal_Jurisdiction → 中国无联邦与州之分
FORCE_VOID → 中国不成文法。CN_Guiding_Cases替代
CN_Probation → 功能对等(缓刑/社区矫正)
→ CN_Retrial_Petition → 功能近似(制度不同)
FORCE_VOID → 中国无法定量刑指南(仅有量刑指导意见)
FORCE_VOID → 中国无此制度，CN_Court_Appoints_Administrator替代
FORCE_VOID → 中国无学生贷款免除制
CN_Equal_Protection_Principle → 功能对等(宪法人人平等)
CN_Punitive_Damages_Limited → 仅限知识产权/消费者领域
CN_Drug_Trafficking → 完全对应(中国立场严苛)
CN_False_Arrest → 功能对等(国家赔偿)

raw_glossary: Administrative Office of the United States Courts (AO)
Aid to Families with Dependent Children (AFDC
Associate Justice of the Supreme Court
CERTIORI - Appeal to U.S. Supreme Court
Certification in Support of Probable Cause
Chief Justice of the Supreme Court
Clerk of the Special Civil Part
Division of Child Protection and Permanency
INTESTACY LAWS - See DESCENT AND DISTRIBUTION STATUTES
Injured Spouse Claim and Allocation Form
Judicial Conference of the United States
Local Property Tax Case Information Statement
Pretrial Release or Pretrial Release Decision
SURVIVORSHIP - Another name for JOINT TENANCY
Superior Court of California, County of Sacramento
TRIAL STATUS/SETTING CONFERENCE - See PRETRIAL SENTENCE
Violation of Conditions of Pretrial Release
called "case ID." Also called DOCKET NUMBER
proof by CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE
